category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Payara as a Java EE application server forked from GlassFish.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is payara; official homepage and GitHub organization use Payara branding.
docs_sources: Official Payara homepage links to docs.payara.fish as Documentation for Payara Server, Micro, Qube, and Community editions.
repo_sources: Official Payara Foundation GitHub organization pins payara/Payara as the Payara Server repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says Java EE application server forked from GlassFish; official Payara GitHub description references Jakarta EE and MicroProfile.
